# Fitflow
> Fitflow is your ultimate SaaS platform for gym management and fitness tracking.

## Overview
Fitflow helps fitness enthusiasts track their workouts and helps gym owners manage their memberships, payments, and schedules all in one place.

## Features for Users
- Track daily workouts and progress.
- Connect with your local gym.
- View personalized AI fitness recommendations.

## Features for Gym Owners
- Manage memberships and billing.
- Send WhatsApp notifications to members.
- Schedule classes and assign trainers.

## Technology
- Built with Next.js App Router.
- Backend powered by Express, Prisma, and PostgreSQL.
- AI features powered by Gemini.

## Important Links
- [Home](https://fitflow.app/)
- [Contact Support](https://fitflow.app/support)
